title: EXCON 2025
location: Bangalore International Exhibition Centre (BIEC), Bengaluru, India
description:
EXCON is South Asia’s largest construction equipment and technology exhibition, hosted biennially by the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII).

Held at the Bangalore International Exhibition Centre (BIEC), EXCON brings together 1000+ exhibitors and global industry professionals to showcase the latest innovations in construction machinery, earthmoving equipment, material handling solutions, concrete technologies, road construction machinery, and smart IoT-enabled systems.

The event features live demonstrations, technology pavilions, international pavilions, seminars, B2B meetings, and thought-leadership sessions focused on sustainability, digital transformation, safety, and productivity. EXCON supports India’s infrastructure growth across highways, metro projects, airports, smart cities, warehousing, and industrial development while enabling collaboration and business networking.

EXCON continues to strengthen India’s position as a hub for construction excellence and future-ready infrastructure solutions.
organizerInfo: The Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) is a premier, industry-led, non-government, not-for-profit organisation dedicated to India’s industrial and economic growth. With over 9,000 direct members and more than 300,000 enterprises associated through sectoral bodies, CII plays a key role in policy development, business competitiveness, and global collaboration. As the organiser of EXCON, CII brings together industry leaders, government authorities, and stakeholders to drive innovation and sustainable development in the construction and infrastructure sectors.

title: LogiMAT India 2026
description:
LogiMAT India 2026 is gearing up to welcome 350+ global and Indian brands to the warehousing & logistics hub of India!

As the country’s definitive intralogistics platform, LogiMAT India brings together key public and private sector stakeholders to drive meaningful dialogue and spotlight breakthrough innovations shaping the future of warehousing, material handling, and supply chain operations.

The 3rd edition, scheduled from 5–7 February 2026 at Bombay Exhibition Centre, NESCO, Mumbai, promises an enriched and future-focused experience for attendees looking to stay ahead of India’s rapidly evolving logistics landscape. The show is organised by Messe Stuttgart India, with MHE Bazar as the Digital Strategic Partner.

Get ready for a bigger, smarter, and more impactful LogiMAT India 2026.
organizerInfo: Messe Stuttgart India is one of the leading trade fair organisers in the country. In a short span, they’ve built a strong presence through exceptional events, driven by a clear mission to bring global exhibition standards to India and support the country’s economic progress by connecting businesses and inspiring growth.

blogs.title: LogiMAT India 2026 brings 350+ global and Indian brands to India's warehousing hub
blogs.author: MHE Bazar Team
blogs.description: LogiMAT India 2026 will bring together 350+ global brands, 1,000+ innovative solutions, and 12,000+ industry professionals in Mumbai from February 5–7, 2026. Discover the latest advancements in warehousing and intralogistics technology.

title: India Warehousing & Logistics Show 2025 (IWLS)
description: Attend the India Warehousing & Logistics Show 2025 (IWLS), Western & Southern India's only platform to display complete warehousing and logistics solutions. The event is co-located with the India Cold Chain Show and features the Cold Chain Conclave on November 20, 2025. This premier industry gathering is organised by RX and is the ideal place to explore cutting-edge material handling, automation, and supply chain technology.
organizerInfo: The India Warehousing & Logistics Show (IWLS) is organised by RX (Reed Exhibitions), a leading global events organizer. IWLS is recognized as Western & Southern India's only dedicated platform for warehousing and logistics solutions. The show is co-located with the India Cold Chain Show, featuring the Cold Chain Conclave. SOTI is the Title Partner for the India Warehousing & Logistics Show.

title: Intralogistics & Warehousing Expo 2025
description: Be Part of India Warehousing & Logistics Expo 2025 – Bengaluru's Biggest Industry Gathering! Experience cutting-edge Material Handling and Logistics solutions, meet top manufacturers, and drive business growth with MHE Bazar at IW Expo Bengaluru 2025. This premier event brings together industry leaders to showcase the future of intralogistics, automation, and supply chain technology.
organizerInfo: MHE Bazar, India’s trusted marketplace for Material Handling Equipment (MHE), actively participates in and hosts key industry events, trade fairs, and technology showcases across the country. These platforms allow us to highlight our latest innovations in forklifts, stackers, lithium-ion conversion kits, and energy-efficient warehouse solutions. As part of Greentech India Material Handling LLP, MHE Bazar is committed to driving India’s transition toward sustainable and smart material handling operations, aligning with the nation’s vision for net-zero emissions by 2070. Through our presence at these events, we connect with manufacturers, distributors, and logistics professionals—demonstrating how our digital platform simplifies the buying, selling, and renting of new or used equipment. We’re proud to announce that MHE Bazar is the official eCommerce Partner for this Expo. Visit us at Booth No. A-41 to explore the future of material handling technology and discover opportunities to build meaningful industry partnerships.

blogs.title: Why You Should Attend Intralogistics and Warehousing Expo 2025 – Bengaluru
blogs.author: MHE Bazar Team
blogs.description: Discover why the Intralogistics and Warehousing Expo 2025 in Bengaluru is a must-attend event for professionals in material handling and logistics.

title: Transport Logistic India 2026 – India’s Premier Global Logistics Trade Fair
meta_title: Transport Logistic India 2026 – India’s Premier Global Logistics Trade Fair
meta_description: Join Transport Logistic India 2026, the inaugural Indian edition of the globally renowned logistics trade fair by Messe München. Held from 25–27 February 2026 at Jio World Convention Centre, Mumbai, the event brings together leaders from air, sea, rail, road, warehousing, and digital supply chains for networking, innovation, and global partnerships.
location: Jio World Convention Centre, Mumbai, India
description: The Inaugural Indian edition of the world’s most trusted logistics trade‑fair brand. From 25–27 February 2026 at Mumbai’s Iconic Jio World Convention Centre, we unite the entire supply‑chain spectrum—air, sea, rail, road, warehousing, and digital solutions—under one roof. Powered by the four‑decade legacy of transport logistic Munich and co‑located with the 11th edition of air cargo India, this landmark event delivers a global marketplace tailored to India’s booming logistics ecosystem. Discover breakthrough technologies, align with national initiatives like PM Gati Shakti and the National Logistics Policy, and forge high‑value partnerships with decision‑makers from across Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas. Whether you’re a cargo owner, 3PL, port operator, tech innovator, or policymaker, transport logistic India 2026 is your gateway to smarter, greener, and more integrated logistics solutions—propelling India toward its vision of becoming a global logistics powerhouse.
organizerInfo: Messe München founded its wholly owned subsidary in 2007 in India, Messe Muenchen India is one of the leading organizers of trade fairs in India. It organizes various B2B trade fairs across various industrial verticals to bring professionals from across sectors together for business, learning and networking opportunities. Messe Muenchen India launched transport logistic INDIA.

title: IWE Expo Mumbai 2026
meta_title: IWE Expo Mumbai 2026 | Warehousing & Intralogistics Exhibition | 14–16 May
meta_description: Join South Asia's largest warehousing & logistics expo, supported by MHE Bazar. 275+ exhibitors, live demos & B2B networking at Bombay Exhibition Centre, Mumbai. Register free — 14–16 May 2026.
location: Bombay Exhibition Centre, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
description:
The Intralogistics & Warehousing Expo (IWE Expo) is South Asia’s largest warehousing, logistics, material handling, automation & supply chain exhibition.

This 5th edition brings together over 275 exhibitors from India, the Middle East and South Asia, showcasing cutting-edge technologies and solutions across warehousing, logistics operations, fulfillment, automation and supply chain management. The event also runs alongside the Material Handling Expo and the E-Commerce Logistics Expo, making it a comprehensive industry showcase and a key B2B networking platform for brands, OEMs, D2C businesses, exporters/importers and logistics leaders.
organizerInfo:
About the Organizer

FME Media Pvt. Ltd. (Future Market Events) is the organiser behind the Intralogistics & Warehousing Expo series.

The company is headquartered in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, with a regional office in Andheri East, Mumbai.

FME Media Pvt. Ltd. specialises in industry trade shows and B2B expos that drive growth, innovation, and business networking across logistics, warehousing, material handling, supply chain, automation and industrial technologies.
